creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #5)
I'll make a "mega patch" today. As Tobias
suggests. That incorporates all the icon ports
that depend on
x11-themes/kde-icons-noia/Makefile.icons
and modify x11-themes/kde-icons-noia/Makefile.icons
accordingly.

Thanks for your attention to this, Nuno.

--Chris
